name: FLEXION THERAPEUT.DL-,001
summary: Flexion Therapeutics, Inc. (acquired by Pacira BioSciences) was a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of novel, locally administered therapies for the treatment of musculoskeletal conditions, including osteoarthritis. Their primary product was Zilretta, an extended-release intra-articular injection for osteoarthritis knee pain. The company was headquartered in Burlington, Massachusetts.
